title: Article Summary
scenario: Summarize a news article in 150-200 words, focusing on the main events and key takeaways.
constraints: Must include the article's title and author
Must be in the present tense

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary meets the word count and tense requirements.
Evaluate the inclusion of the article's title and author.
Assess the clarity and accuracy of the main events described.
